rag_rules: Fix unresolved references or invalid expressions before adding AGREE clauses to avoid type errors
Use only visible AADL features or declared helpers in AGREE expressions
generic_rules: AGREE contracts must reference valid types and visible identifiers
Assignments in implementation scope must target output features or declared variables
Guarantee statements should relate visible inputs to visible outputs in component type scopes
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Use nested if-then-else for branching logic in AGREE
anti_patterns: Do not reference undefined identifiers or invalid types in AGREE expressions
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
